---
title: "Manage attestation templates"
date: last-modified
aliases:
  - /guide/manage-attestation-templates.html
---

Create and customize attestation templates to standardize the attestation process across your organization. Templates define the structure, required approvers, and guidelines for attestations.

::: {.attn}

## Prerequisites

- [x] {{< var link.login >}}
- [x] You are a [{{< fa hand >}} Customer Admin]{.bubble} or assigned another role with sufficient permissions to manage templates.[^1]

:::

## Steps

1. In the left sidebar, click **{{< fa gear >}} Settings**.

2. Under Workspace Settings, select **{{< fa clone >}} Templates**.

3. Select the **Attestation** tab to view existing attestation templates.

4. Create a new template:
   - Click **{{< fa file-circle-plus >}} New Template**
   - Enter a template name and description
   - Select a base template to start from (optional)

5. Configure template settings:
   - Define required approvers and their roles
   - Set up approval workflows
   - Add compliance requirements
   - Configure document sections and guidelines

6. Customize template content:
   - Add or modify sections
   - Update guidelines and requirements
   - Configure validation rules
   - Set up automated checks

7. Save and publish the template:
   - Click **{{< fa floppy-disk >}} Save Draft** to work on it later
   - Click **{{< fa paper-plane >}} Publish** to make it available for use

::: {.callout}
You can duplicate existing templates to create new ones based on your current configuration.
:::

## What's next

- [Create attestation](create-attestation.qmd)
- [Review attestation](review-attestation.qmd)
- [Approve attestation](approve-attestation.qmd)

<!-- FOOTNOTES -->

[^1]: [Manage permissions](/guide/configuration/manage-permissions.qmd)
